{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Kawai Shrine (Shimogamo Shrine Keidai-Sessha)'''|河合神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamashiro Province]].
